pattern: Track unmatched open and unmatched close counts in a single left-to-right pass; their sum is the answer.
hints: A closing bracket is unmatched only when there are no pending open brackets to absorb it.
Count open brackets that were never closed and close brackets that had nothing to match.
One pass: increment 'open' on '('; on ')' decrement open if positive, else increment 'close'. Return open + close.

stress.description: random parentheses strings of varying lengths
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = min(1000, max(1, size))
    s = ''.join(rng.choice('()') for _ in range(n))
    return [s]
